label: Stat part (player faction leader)
description: Adds a flat offset to the stat when the pawn is the leader of the player faction.

Class.label: Class
Class.description: C# StatPart type used by RimWorld DirectXmlLoader for this list item.

priority.label: Priority
priority.description: Sort order among stat parts. Higher values execute later.

offset.label: Offset
offset.description: Flat offset added to the stat for the player faction leader.
